provenance.anthropicModelIdsAndPricing: Claude API reference (claude-api skill), Current Models table cached 2026-06-04 — authoritative
provenance.lmstudioCapabilities: Operator knowledge (OpenAI-compatible response_format json_schema) — NOT yet validated; see liveValidationGate

notes: conformanceStatus is now LIVE-VERIFIED for two OpenRouter routes (Phase 0 0.4 empirical re-run, 2026-06-29): openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro and openrouter/anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5 both passed structured-output (json_schema strict) AND tool-use probes (raw responses in scratchpad/phase0/0.4-rerun, captured via the operator's OpenRouter key). All OTHER pairs (claude native, openai, openrouter/claude-sonnet-4-6, openrouter/gpt-4o-mini, ollama, lmstudio) remain conformanceStatus 'unknown' — no live probe ran for them (no native Anthropic/OpenAI key, local Ollama/LM Studio deferred). Per ARCHITECTURE.md §7/§12 a pair must pass the conformance harness before it is matrix-eligible; the broker MUST treat 'unknown' as ineligible. Note: the two verified routes are validated via OpenRouter ROUTING; a native claude-agent-sdk runtime-conformance check stays a Phase-5 gate.
Secrets are Keychain references only (REQ-S-003). No API key value appears in this file; 'secretRef' names a SecretsPort/Keychain service entry that an operator must create.

Local providers (ollama, lmstudio) carry egressClass 'local' — the only legal route for unacknowledged Employer-Work raw content (§5 egress veto). OpenRouter is its OWN processor (egressClass cloud), never an OpenAI alias (safety rule 5).

Budget enforcement reads pricing + caps FROM this file (ARCHITECTURE.md §5.4 — must not hardcode). Cloud per-token prices other than Anthropic are intentionally null + sourced; an operator fills them from the cited pricing page (do not invent).

structuredOutput.detail: output_config.format = { type: json_schema } and/or strict tool use (strict:true). Constrained decoding. HIGH fidelity.
response_format = { type: json_schema, json_schema: { strict: true, schema } }. Supported on gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o-2024-08-06 and later incl. GPT-5 family / gpt-5.5. HIGH fidelity.

response_format json_object (basic) or json_schema strict (per model). Support is MODEL-SPECIFIC; filter with GET /api/v1/models?supported_parameters=structured_outputs. Fidelity depends on the routed underlying model.

conformanceProbe.note: Claude conformance here is validated via OpenRouter ROUTING only; a native claude-agent-sdk / api.anthropic.com runtime-conformance check remains a Phase-5 gate (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY at probe time).

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6.note: research-pinned; not probed in 0.4 re-run (probed haiku-4.5 as the cheap Claude route).

structuredOutput.detail: /api/chat with `format` = a JSON Schema object (Ollama >= 0.5). Also OpenAI-compat response_format on /v1. Fidelity is model-dependent.

toolUse.detail: Tools array on /api/chat; supported by tool-capable models (qwen3, llama3.1+, gpt-oss).

qwen3.note: recommended local default for structured-output + tool-use

structuredOutput.detail: OpenAI-compatible response_format = { type: json_schema, json_schema: { strict, schema } }. RESEARCH-ONLY in this spike — not validated against a running endpoint.

qwen2.5-7b-instruct.note: placeholder; LM Studio model ids are user-loaded

capabilityDefaults._comment: Seeds ProviderMatrix.capabilityDefaults: Record<Capability, ProviderRoute>. ProviderRoute = exactly one of {provider|runtime}, plus model, endpoint, egressClass. 'cloudPreferred' is the default; 'localZeroEgress' is the §5-veto-legal route for unacknowledged Employer-Work raw content. All routes start conformanceStatus=unknown (broker treats as ineligible until §12 harness flips to passing).

localZeroEgress.note: Hermes runtime surface decided in Spike 0.3; route flagged pending that go/no-go.

meeting.close.rationale: Proof-spine critical path needs tool-policy/structured-output/subagent semantics → AgentRuntimePort, highest-quality model. DoD requires >=1 conformant provider/runtime for this capability (ARCHITECTURE.md §7).

extraction.rationale: Schema-validated latent extraction; Sonnet 4.6 balances cost/quality, strong structured-output fidelity.

premiumAlt.note: use when synthesis quality dominates cost (e.g. weekly/monthly reviews).

cheap.classify.rationale: Routing/triage classification; Haiku 4.5 is the cheapest Claude tier ($1/$5 per MTok) and supports structured output.

copilot.qa.rationale: Read-path Q&A with citations, no side effects (ARCHITECTURE.md §9 flow 13).

budgets._comment: COST-1/2 (REQ-S-007). maxRuntimeSeconds is always required per job; maxCostUsd default applies to any LLM-calling job that lacks one (COST-2). Enforcement reads these values from config (ARCHITECTURE.md §5.4).
budgets.derivation: 18.23 step 2: meeting.close + source.process (the two subscription-EXTRACTION legs) carry the $1.50 extraction cap. Deny-only/fail-safe (a raise never newly-denies a tokenless dormant job). BOTH maxCostUsd AND maxRuntimeSeconds are RE-CONFIRM-AT-FINAL-SPEND PLACEHOLDERS (owner sets exact values at the step-7 flip): ~$0.45 real on sonnet for a ~100k-tok transcript, the conservative meter over-counts ~3x. classify/extraction/synthesis/copilot tiers scaled down. OQ-004 perf-budget pass (Spike 0.6) may refine.

costEstimation.formula: estUsd = promptTokens * inUsdPerMTok / 1e6 + completionTokens * outUsdPerMTok / 1e6, accumulated over a job's provider calls; cancel on breach (COST-1, no partial side effect).

priceSourceByProvider.claude: Claude API reference (claude-api skill) Current Models table, cached 2026-06-04 — authoritative; values below.
priceSourceByProvider.openai: https://openai.com/api/pricing/ — operator must fill (do not invent).
priceSourceByProvider.openrouter: Per-model, dynamic: GET https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models returns each model's pricing; meter should read live. Static page: https://openrouter.ai/models

pricing._unit: USD per 1,000,000 tokens (in = prompt/input, out = completion/output)

openrouter._note: dynamic per-model; read from /api/v1/models at runtime; do not hardcode.

liveValidationGate.what: Run the conformance harness (ARCHITECTURE.md §12, Spike→Phase-5 §5.10) against each provider x capability x pinned-model pair to flip conformanceStatus unknown -> passing; failing pairs disabled.
liveVerified: openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro — structured-output (json_schema strict) + tool-use both PASSING (Phase 0 0.4 empirical re-run, 2026-06-29; raw: scratchpad/phase0/0.4-rerun/deepseek-deepseek-v4-pro-{structured,tool}.json)

openrouter/anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5 — structured-output (json_schema strict) + tool-use both PASSING (same run; raw: scratchpad/phase0/0.4-rerun/anthropic-claude-haiku-4-5-{structured,tool}.json). Validated via OpenRouter routing only.
stillBlockedOn: Native Anthropic Claude (api.anthropic.com) + native OpenAI conformance — no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY at probe time. Claude conformance proven here is via OpenRouter ROUTING; a native claude-agent-sdk runtime-conformance check remains a Phase-5 gate.
Local providers (ollama :11434 / lmstudio :1234) — DEFERRED by operator decision to a later pass (reduce local resource overhead); not probed in this re-run.
OpenRouter routes NOT probed in this pass (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6, openai/gpt-4o-mini) — still 'unknown'.
Operator-supplied OpenAI per-token prices to complete costEstimation.pricing (OpenRouter prices are dynamic per-model via /api/v1/models).
